data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for pool/spa maintenance logs with service provider and host signatures.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Pool/spa maintenance logs with service provider + host signatures', but there is no concrete evidence or API reads provided that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case outlines various signature needs, yet the evidence does not include any specific checks or validations related to pool/spa maintenance logs. This lack of evidence indicates that the validation process is incomplete, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of pool/spa maintenance logs with service provider + host signatures.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
